chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No. D-5075 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on office objection No.18 2. For hearing of CMA No. 21526/2020 3. For hearing of main case 21-02-2025 Mr. Arshad Hussain Shehzad Advocate for Petitioner Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Ms. Summiya Kalwar Advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent No. 2 and 3 which is taken on record. It is jointly submitted that the controversy is covered by a Judgment of D.B. of this Court dated 02.03.2021 in CP No. D-368 of 2018 and other connected matters. In view of forgoing and reliance upon the reasoning in the aforesaid judgment, this petition is also dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad PS
